creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
Web page https://get.typo3.org/version/12 says

PHP >= 8.1.0 <= 8.2.99

though the announcement https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1246-and-11531-maintenance-releases-published says

Suppport for 8.3

According to that I guess

IGNORE_WITH_PHP=        80 83

would be correct to be on the safe side.
